notation.name: quaternionic wavefunction
notation.meaning: Quaternion obtained by grouping the four real coefficients of a two-component complex spinor into one quaternion.

notation.name: two-component spinor
notation.meaning: Normalized spin-1/2 state written as the column vector (alpha, beta)^T in C^2.

notation.name: spinor components
notation.meaning: Complex amplitudes of a spin-1/2 state vector in C^2.

notation.name: real coefficient coordinates
notation.meaning: Real coefficients obtained by writing alpha = a_0 + a_1 i and beta = b_0 + b_1 i.

notation.name: quaternion algebra
notation.meaning: Hamilton's quaternion algebra with basis 1, i, j, k.

notation.name: quaternion basis units
notation.meaning: Imaginary quaternion units satisfying i^2 = j^2 = k^2 = ijk = -1.

notation.name: two-dimensional complex state space
notation.meaning: Ambient complex vector space for two-component spinors before projectivization.

notation.name: three-sphere
notation.meaning: Unit sphere in four real dimensions; in this paper it appears both as the normalized quaternionic-wavefunction sphere and as the manifold underlying the unit quaternions.

notation.name: quaternion-SU(2) map
notation.meaning: Fixed convention mapping quaternions to 2 x 2 complex matrices so that unit quaternions model SU(2).

notation.name: special unitary group
notation.meaning: Group of 2 x 2 complex unitary matrices with determinant 1, naturally associated with spin-1/2 transformations.

notation.name: unit-quaternion group
notation.meaning: Group of unit quaternions, identified with SU(2) under the fixed map Phi.

notation.name: rotation group in three dimensions
notation.meaning: Group of proper spatial rotations, related to SU(2) by the standard double cover.

notation.name: Pauli matrices
notation.meaning: Standard Pauli matrices generating the spin-1/2 representation of SU(2).
